name: Butterball
description: BODY LOTION: Get soft and snuggly with this dreamy cream of moisturising cocoa butter and almond oil, with a comforting vanilla — like fragrance.
archive_note: One of Lush's longest-running products, Butterball has been a mainstay on the main line for decades before appearing as Kitchen iterations
nostalgia_angle: Butterball is one of Lush's most enduring and beloved bath bombs, a staple since the early days and a perennial fan favourite for its simple, skin-loving luxury
throwback_reference: The original Butterball bath bomb, a Lush classic known for its cocoa butter and almond oil skin-softening properties
